channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Hazelmere between Esmond and Charteris, 8th March
item.description:
Bag of rubbish dumped, plus street needs sweeping, plus lots of rubbish in the bushes on the houses between Esmond and Charteris on the west side of the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hazelmere Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Post box square, 8th March
item.description:
Bag of rubbish, plus area needs sweeping, there is rubbish in the planters as well.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hazelmere Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Rubbish Problem on Network Rail Land, 8th March
item.description:
I am writing to report a significant amount of rubbish scattered around the railway area managed by Network Rail near my building. The area appears poorly maintained, with litter spread across the ground and along the railway boundary. This creates an unpleasant environment for local residents. In the summer, the rubbish attracts large numbers of flies and mosquitoes, and it also raises concerns about the potential presence of rats. I would appreciate it if this issue could be investigated and the rubbish cleared as soon as possible. Regular maintenance or cleaning in this area would also help prevent the problem from recurring and reduce potential health risks to the local community. Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your response.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees (lack of), 8th March
item.description:
There are four unsightly pavement tree stumps within a stone's throw of each other at this location (outside numbers 78,80,82) and across the road. All need grubbing up and replacing, please, ideally as a single job. It would be good to have an approximate timeline for this, if possible, please!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rodenhurst Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Priory park road, 8th March
item.description:
Bags dumped, plus the street needs sweeping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Glengall Road still not swept, 8th March
item.description:
According to you it’s been done! I live here and i didn’t see litter picker The street still messy Please send a litter picker Thanx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glengall Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tyler street is filthy with rubbish covering footpaths., 8th March
item.description:
The Trafalgar road side of Tyler street is totally littered with rubbish which is very unpleasant! It makes it difficult for people with pushchairs or wheelchairs as it covers the paths.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tyler Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish being spread by animals, 8th March
item.description:
Large collection of rubbish that is starting to smell and be eaten and spread by animals all long Tyler street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tyler Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 black bags of food waste and packaging dumped at junction of Mitchell Close and Commonwealth Way, also very large purple plastic object, 8th March
item.description:
These bags of food waste have been torn apart by foxes and contents strewn all over the road = health hazard and trip hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling on Pembury estate, 8th March
item.description:
Witnessed This man’s XL bully doing a large poo which was not picked up at 13:45 on Sunday 8 march

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bodney Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
